title: The Rock Mod
description:
This is a Mod about Rocks, not Dwayne. It's based off of one of my Addons I created for Minecraft Bedrock.

The Mod you didn't ask for, but you got.
body:
# The Rock Mod
This is a Mod about Rocks, not Dwayne (might add him though). It's based off of one of my Addons I created for Minecraft
<details>
<summary>uhhh</summary>

bad edition

</details>

 Bedrock.

## Thanks!
Thanks for over 100 downloads, it just makes me happy to see that over 100 people tried the mod instead of skipping over it.

## Ideas
If you have any suggestions what to add to the mod, please send a message on the Discord Server by clicking [here.](https://discord.gg/Duuxp5HqpN)

## Mod Map
There's a mod map showcasing the stuff the mod adds to Minecraft. (Download on Discord only.) [https://discord.gg/Duuxp5HqpN](https://discord.gg/Duuxp5HqpN)

## Little Prank
If you have a server that supports added random mods, disguise the file name (without the Modrinth App) by renaming it as something else and tell your friends to download it. Then craft bedrock (yes, bedrock) and just casually walk around them holding it to confuse them.
